'''bovahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atactic|atactic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atactic|atactic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bovahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovahithi|bovahithi]] || [[word:bovahiji|bovahiji]] || [[word:bovahishi|bovahishi]] || [[word:bovahiki|bovahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovahuthuthu|bovahuthuthu]] || [[word:bovahujuju|bovahujuju]] || [[word:bovahushushu|bovahushushu]] || [[word:bovahukuku|bovahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovahuthu|bovahuthu]] || [[word:bovahuju|bovahuju]] || [[word:bovahushu|bovahushu]] || [[word:bovahuku|bovahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovahufthuf|bovahufthuf]] || [[word:bovahufjuf|bovahufjuf]] || [[word:bovahufshuf|bovahufshuf]] || [[word:bovahufkuf|bovahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovahethe|bovahethe]] || [[word:bovaheje|bovaheje]] || [[word:bovaheshe|bovaheshe]] || [[word:bovaheke|bovaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovahothotho|bovahothotho]] || [[word:bovahojojo|bovahojojo]] || [[word:bovahoshosho|bovahoshosho]] || [[word:bovahokoko|bovahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovahotho|bovahotho]] || [[word:bovahojo|bovahojo]] || [[word:bovahosho|bovahosho]] || [[word:bovahoko|bovahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovahofthof|bovahofthof]] || [[word:bovahofjof|bovahofjof]] || [[word:bovahofshof|bovahofshof]] || [[word:bovahofkof|bovahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfthÃŸf|bovahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfjÃŸf|bovahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfshÃŸf|bovahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfkÃŸf|bovahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bovahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bovahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bovahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bovahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfthÃŸf|bovahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfjÃŸf|bovahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfshÃŸf|bovahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfkÃŸf|bovahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfthÃŸf|bovahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfjÃŸf|bovahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfshÃŸf|bovahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bovahÃŸfkÃŸf|bovahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovahÃḊthÃḊ|bovahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bovahÃḊjÃḊ|bovahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bovahÃḊshÃḊ|bovahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bovahÃḊkÃḊ|bovahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovahathatha|bovahathatha]] || [[word:bovahajaja|bovahajaja]] || [[word:bovahashasha|bovahashasha]] || [[word:bovahakaka|bovahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovahatha|bovahatha]] || [[word:bovahaja|bovahaja]] || [[word:bovahasha|bovahasha]] || [[word:bovahaka|bovahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovahafthaf|bovahafthaf]] || [[word:bovahafjaf|bovahafjaf]] || [[word:bovahafshaf|bovahafshaf]] || [[word:bovahafkaf|bovahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bovahasha|bovahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovahshÃḋasha|bovahshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovahroasha|bovahroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovahmuasha|bovahmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovahyaasha|bovahyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovahnkshÃḋasha|gobovahnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovahnkroasha|gobovahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovahnkmuasha|gobovahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovahnkyaasha|gobovahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bovavahasha|bovavahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovavahshÃḋasha|bovavahshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovavahroasha|bovavahroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovavahmuasha|bovavahmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovavahyaasha|bovavahyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovavahnkshÃḋasha|gobovavahnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovavahnkroasha|gobovavahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovavahnkmuasha|gobovavahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovavahnkyaasha|gobovavahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bevÃḊhasha|bevÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bevÃḊhshÃḋasha|bevÃḊhshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bevÃḊhroasha|bevÃḊhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bevÃḊhmuasha|bevÃḊhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bevÃḊhyaasha|bevÃḊhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobevÃḊhnkshÃḋasha|gobevÃḊhnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobevÃḊhnkroasha|gobevÃḊhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobevÃḊhnkmuasha|gobevÃḊhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobevÃḊhnkyaasha|gobevÃḊhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bovfahasha|bovfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovfahshÃḋasha|bovfahshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovfahroasha|bovfahroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovfahmuasha|bovfahmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovfahyaasha|bovfahyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovfahnkshÃḋasha|gobovfahnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovfahnkroasha|gobovfahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovfahnkmuasha|gobovfahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovfahnkyaasha|gobovfahnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
